an8.90:0.3: Proper Behavior in a Case of Aggravated Misconduct
an8.90:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, a bhikkhu charged with aggravated misconduct
should behave rightly with respect to eight principles. (1) He should not give full ordination; (2) he should not give dependence;
(3) he should not have a novice attend upon him; (4) he should not accept an agreement to serve as an exhorter of bhikkhunīs; (5) even if he is agreed upon, he should not exhort bhikkhunīs; (6) he should not accept any agreement
in the Saṅgha; (7) he should not be placed in any chief position; (8) he should not give rehabilitation
with that root.
A bhikkhu charged with aggravated misconduct should behave rightly with respect to these eight principles."
